pom.xml.general_idea: Updated the target Java version property from 17 to 21 to align with the new JDK environment.
Bumped Spring Boot parent version from 3.4.2 to 3.4.4 for minor updates.
Downgraded MapStruct version from 1.6.3 to 1.5.5.Final, likely for compatibility or stability reasons.
Added Spring Batch version property to manage batch processing dependencies.
Added Apache POI version property to manage Excel file processing dependencies.
Reordered spring-boot-starter-web and spring-boot-starter-data-jpa dependencies without changing versions.
Moved spring-boot-starter-test dependency to a different location in the list.
Removed spring-boot-starter-actuator dependency.
Added spring-boot-starter-security to enable Spring Security features.
Added jjwt-api dependency for JWT token handling.
Added jjwt-impl dependency for JWT implementation.
Added jjwt-jackson dependency for JWT Jackson serialization.
Added spring-security-test dependency for testing security configurations.
Added commons-lang3 dependency for utility classes.
Added spring-boot-starter-validation for bean validation support.
Added springdoc-openapi-starter-webmvc-ui for Swagger UI documentation.
Added springdoc-openapi-starter-webmvc-api for OpenAPI specification generation.
Added spring-boot-starter-batch for Spring Batch support.
Added spring-batch-excel for Excel processing in Spring Batch.
Added spring-batch-core for core Spring Batch functionality.
Added h2 database dependency for in-memory database support.
Added Apache POI dependency for reading/writing Microsoft Office formats.
Added Apache POI OOXML dependency for Office Open XML formats.
Added hibernate-jpamodelgen to dependency management for metamodel generation.
Added jaxb-runtime to dependency management for JAXB support.
Replaced maven-compiler-plugin configuration with spring-boot-maven-plugin configuration for Lombok exclusion.
Downgraded Checkstyle plugin version from 10.21.2 to 10.13.0.
Removed the duplicate spring-boot-maven-plugin block that was previously configured.

LICENSE.md.general_idea: Removed the 'XYZ' prefix from the copyright holder name in the license file.
LICENSE.md.human_impl: Changed 'XYZ Borek Solutions Group' to 'Borek Solutions Group'

README.md.general_idea: Updated the proprietary software owner name from a placeholder to the actual company name.
Corrected the relative path to the LICENSE file in the README.
Removed the section listing configured application features as it was likely outdated or redundant.
README.md.human_impl: Deleted 'What has been configured in this application ?' section

src/main/resources/application.yml.general_idea: Added configuration for JWT token signing key to support authentication.
